meaning: v.重击,砰然地响n.重击,重击声
examples: He felt a thump on his shoulder.
She gave him a thump on the back.
There was a thump as the truck hit the bank.
But now there was another thump, and the dog barked, and another thump followed.
The White Stripes covered her 1948 track "Conquest" on their 2007 album Icky Thump.
